loanCalculator.title: Loan Calculator
loanCalculator.subtitle: Free and easy-to-use loan calculator. Calculate monthly payments, total interest and repayment schedule for your loan.
notes: Interest rates may vary depending on bank policies
Displayed interest rate is nominal, actual rate may differ
Payment includes only principal and interest, excludes other fees
Different loan types may have different interest rates and conditions
Should carefully check terms and conditions before borrowing

notes: Interest rates may vary depending on each bank's policies
Displayed rates are published rates, actual rates may differ
Online deposits often have higher rates than counter deposits
Check early withdrawal conditions before depositing
Consider term deposits for better interest rates

savingsTypesList.description: Flexible withdrawal but low interest rate

savingsTypesList.description: Add monthly with preferential interest rate

savingsTypesList.name: Super Preferential Savings
savingsTypesList.description: Large amount, long term with highest interest rate

grossToNetCalculator.title: Gross to Net Salary Calculator
grossToNetCalculator.subtitle: Accurate gross to net salary calculator according to Vietnamese law. Calculate personal income tax, social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance.

deductions.name: Social Insurance (8%)
deductions.description: Social insurance, calculated on maximum salary of 20x regional average wage

deductions.name: Health Insurance (1.5%)
deductions.description: Health insurance, calculated on full salary

deductions.name: Unemployment Insurance (1%)
deductions.description: Unemployment insurance, calculated on maximum salary of 20x regional average wage

deductions.name: PIT
deductions.description: Personal income tax, progressive tax schedule applies

regions.1: I - Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City
regions.2: II - Da Nang, Hai Phong, Can Tho

notes: Gross salary is total income before deducting insurance and taxes
Net salary is actual amount received after deducting all mandatory amounts
Social insurance contribution has maximum limit
PIT applies progressive tax schedule by brackets

netToGrossCalculator.title: Net to Gross Salary Calculator
netToGrossCalculator.subtitle: Accurate net to gross salary calculator. Determine the gross salary needed to achieve desired net salary after taxes and insurance deductions.
guideSteps: Enter desired net salary (actual amount received)
Select region (maximum salary for social insurance)
Tool will automatically calculate required gross salary
Check deduction details to understand salary structure
tips: Always be clear about gross or net salary when negotiating
Gross salary is 20-30% higher than net salary
Consider allowances and bonuses when negotiating
Check company's social insurance policy (full or not)
Request detailed salary breakdown when receiving offer
netToGrossCalculator.disclaimer: The above figures are for reference only, actual figures may vary depending on specific factors.

usageTips.title: Usage Tips
tips: Use this tool when you receive a net salary offer and want to know the corresponding gross
When negotiating salary, propose gross salary to avoid confusion
Don't forget to calculate bonuses and allowances when negotiating total income
Check if company pays social insurance on full salary
Some companies have 'flexible' salary policies with various allowances

results.convergenceError: Could not find exact gross. Closest result with error: {amount}
results.formula:
Net Salary = Gross Salary - Insurance (10.5%) - PIT
PIT applies progressive tax schedule
taxTips: Declare all dependents to maximize deductions
Contribute to voluntary pension fund to reduce PIT
